Event: Royal Challenge - Season 17
Event Date: 01/09/2023
Sage Bot Item Code: A123
Frosty Companion

Triggers: Duration of the battle

The power of ice gives the owner of the artifact special abilities:
The unit can’t be frozen.
When attacking, the unit has a 40% chance to freeze the target. While frozen, it is unable to move or attack for 1 sec. Also, the cooldown times of the target’s gear abilities are increased by 1 sec.
Whenever an enemy is frozen, the owner of the artifact deals 200000 magic damage to that enemy.

Requirements: 90-100

User rating: item not rated yet
